eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 11:11 AM on SEP 16, 2019 Effective until 9:11 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A Silver Alert has been issued for  Maricopa County.  This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Glendale Police Department is looking for fourteen year old Alicia Navarro,  a Hispanic female,  last seen on foot near the area of 45th avenue and Rose Lane.  Alicia is autistic. If you have contact with the Silver Alert, Please call 911.  Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
